metadata.title: 50 AI Prompt Templates for Crypto & Business
metadata.description: Professional prompt templates using RTCFR framework

framework_guide.role: The persona or expertise the AI should adopt
framework_guide.task: The specific action or deliverable requested
framework_guide.context: Background information, audience, goals, tone, format, restrictions

prompts.title: Beldex Beginner Education
prompts.role: AI educator specializing in explaining crypto concepts to beginners
prompts.task: Explain what Beldex is in a simple and easy-to-understand way

context.format: 5 bullet points with one real-life analogy

prompts.few_shot_example: Blockchain is like a digital notebook where all transactions are recorded.
prompts.report: Create a 5-point explanation with one real-life analogy. Use simple language that a 10th-grade student can understand.

prompts.title: Telegram Engagement Posts
prompts.role: Crypto content creator for a Beldex community
prompts.task: Generate 5 engaging Telegram posts to educate and engage beginners
prompts.few_shot_example: Privacy matters 🔐 Here's why protecting your data is important…
prompts.report: Create 5 unique posts with emojis, clear call-to-action, simple language suitable for beginners

prompts.title: FAQ Generation for Beldex
prompts.role: AI support assistant for a crypto community
prompts.task: Generate 10 frequently asked questions about Beldex with answers

context.goal: Reduce repeated queries and improve support

prompts.few_shot_example: Q: What is Beldex? A: A privacy-focused blockchain ecosystem designed to protect user data.
prompts.report: Create 10 Q&A pairs covering fundamental questions, features, security, legality, and usage

prompts.title: Comparative Analysis Table
prompts.task: Create a detailed comparison table of Beldex vs Bitcoin vs Ethereum
prompts.few_shot_example: Bitcoin = Store of value, Ethereum = Platform for apps, Beldex = Privacy communication
prompts.report: Create comparison table with rows for privacy, use case, technology, speed, ease of use, regulatory status

prompts.title: Business Proposal for AI Integration
prompts.task: Create a complete business proposal for implementing AI in a Beldex community

context.goal: Improve engagement and automate repetitive tasks

prompts.few_shot_example: AI can automate repetitive tasks and improve community engagement by 40%
prompts.report: Include problem identification, proposed solution, timeline, outcomes, pricing, ROI, risk mitigation

prompts.title: Whitepaper Summary
prompts.task: Summarize the Beldex whitepaper for beginners
prompts.few_shot_example: Blockchain = shared digital record that can't be altered
prompts.report: Extract and explain vision, technology, features, differentiators, roadmap

prompts.title: Simplification Rewrite
prompts.task: Rewrite complex Beldex explanation in very simple terms
prompts.few_shot_example: Crypto = digital money that doesn't need a bank
prompts.report: Rewrite to be understandable by 12-year-old, free of jargon, relatable with everyday examples

prompts.title: Crypto Glossary Terms
prompts.task: Define 15 essential crypto terms with Beldex context
prompts.few_shot_example: Blockchain = A digital ledger that records all transactions permanently
prompts.report: Create definitions for privacy coin, cryptocurrency, wallet, transaction, hash, mining, etc.

prompts.title: Beldex vs Bitcoin Analysis
prompts.task: Create detailed comparison of Beldex and Bitcoin
prompts.few_shot_example: Bitcoin = Store of value, Beldex = Privacy-focused communication
prompts.report: Compare across design philosophy, purpose, privacy, speed, scalability, community, regulation

prompts.title: Student-Friendly Explanation
prompts.task: Explain Beldex to school students (age 14-18)
prompts.few_shot_example: Internet = Global network connecting millions of computers
prompts.report: Create school-related analogy, 150-word narrative, explain privacy importance, include call-to-action

prompts.title: YouTube Educational Script
prompts.task: Write a YouTube video script explaining Beldex
prompts.few_shot_example: Let's break this down into three simple parts...
prompts.report: Structure hook, introduction, main explanation, why it matters, call-to-action with timing

prompts.title: Professional Blog Article
prompts.task: Write a professional blog article on Beldex
prompts.few_shot_example: Beldex is emerging as a privacy-first blockchain solution...
prompts.report: Create SEO-friendly headline, intro, 3-4 sections, features, advantages, use cases, conclusion

prompts.title: Tamil-English Mixed Explanation
prompts.role: Local crypto educator for Tamil-speaking audience
prompts.task: Explain Beldex in Tamil-influenced English

context.tone: Conversational and relatable to local context

prompts.few_shot_example: Just like saving money in a bank safely, Beldex keeps your digital data safe
prompts.report: Use Tamil cultural references, local financial concepts, real-world examples, address local concerns

prompts.title: Privacy Coins Importance
prompts.task: Explain the importance of privacy coins in the crypto ecosystem
prompts.few_shot_example: Privacy coins address fundamental concerns about financial surveillance
prompts.report: Explain why privacy matters, surveillance concerns, pressures, use cases, market potential, challenges

prompts.title: Advertising Copy
prompts.task: Create advertisement copy for privacy coin campaign
prompts.few_shot_example: Protect your privacy with Beldex 🔐
prompts.report: Create 5 ad variations (privacy, security, freedom, community, innovation focus) with 25-50 word copy

prompts.title: Ecosystem Description
prompts.task: Describe the complete Beldex ecosystem
prompts.few_shot_example: Beldex offers a comprehensive suite of privacy-focused tools
prompts.report: Describe token, BChat, BelNet, blockchain, integration, roadmap, community

prompts.title: Beginner Learning Story
prompts.task: Write a story about learning crypto safely
prompts.few_shot_example: Ravi wanted to learn about cryptocurrency but didn't know where to start...
prompts.report: Create relatable protagonist, confusion, Beldex discovery, learning journey, success, call-to-action

prompts.title: Digital Privacy Poem
prompts.task: Write a poem on digital privacy importance
prompts.few_shot_example: In a world of open data flows...
prompts.report: Create poem addressing concerns poetically, mention challenges, end with hope/solution

prompts.title: Conversation Script (2 Beginners)
prompts.task: Create realistic conversation between two crypto beginners
prompts.few_shot_example: A: What is Beldex? B: It's a cryptocurrency that protects your privacy online.
prompts.report: Create 10-15 exchanges, realistic questions, clear answers, building complexity, realistic objections

prompts.title: Workshop Invitation Email
prompts.task: Write an email invitation to crypto/AI workshop
prompts.few_shot_example: Join our exclusive AI + Crypto workshop for beginners...
prompts.report: Include subject line, greeting, value prop, topics, date/time, registration, FAQ, signature

prompts.title: Privacy Coins Debate
prompts.task: List pros and cons of privacy coins
prompts.few_shot_example: Pros: Enhanced user privacy, Cons: Regulatory challenges
prompts.report: Create 5 pros, 5 cons each with details, counterarguments, regulatory view, examples, conclusion

prompts.title: Thought Leadership Opinion
prompts.task: Write opinion piece on privacy importance
prompts.few_shot_example: Privacy is becoming a fundamental right in the digital age...
prompts.report: Cover current landscape, why it matters, business implications, individual rights, solutions, CTA

prompts.title: Crypto-Travel Analogy
prompts.task: Explain cryptocurrencies using travel analogy
prompts.few_shot_example: Cryptocurrency is like traveling with a passport that works everywhere...
prompts.report: Develop analogy explaining crypto, blockchain, wallet, transactions, privacy coins, limitations

prompts.title: User Query Classification
prompts.task: Categorize support queries by complexity level
prompts.few_shot_example: Beginner: What is blockchain? Intermediate: How do I secure my wallet?
prompts.report: Create beginner (20), intermediate (15), advanced (10) example queries with routing instructions

prompts.title: Content Translation Guide
prompts.task: Translate crypto content between English and Tamil
prompts.few_shot_example: English: Blockchain is a distributed ledger, Tamil: ப்ளாக்செயின் விநியோகிக்கப்பட்ட கணக்குப்புத்தகம்
prompts.report: Translate 20 key terms, 10 questions, 5 safety messages, include cultural considerations

prompts.title: FAQ Response
prompts.task: Answer 10 most common user questions
prompts.few_shot_example: Q: Is Beldex safe? A: Yes, Beldex uses military-grade encryption.
prompts.report: Answer 10 key questions about what, how, where, legal, features, speed, mining, integration

prompts.title: Confusion Resolution
prompts.role: Support agent specializing in confusion management
prompts.task: Handle common user confusions and misconceptions
prompts.few_shot_example: Misconception: Crypto is only for illegal activities, Correction: It has many legitimate uses
prompts.report: Address 10 common misconceptions with clear corrections and explanations

prompts.title: Chatbot FAQ Handler
prompts.task: Generate clear answers for chatbot automation
prompts.few_shot_example: User: How do I reset password? Bot: I can help! Choose option 1 or 2.
prompts.report: Create responses for login (5), wallet (5), transactions (5), features (5), security (5)

prompts.title: Tutor Explanation of Doubts
prompts.task: Explain doubts using step-by-step approach
prompts.few_shot_example: Student: I don't understand blockchain. Tutor: Let me break it into 5 simple steps...
prompts.report: Create step-by-step explanations for 5 concepts with 5-7 clear steps each

prompts.title: Workshop Quiz Creation
prompts.task: Create quiz questions for crypto workshops
prompts.few_shot_example: Q: What does BDX stand for? A) Blockchain Digital Exchange B) Digital Currency
prompts.report: Create 20 questions: 10 MC (easy/medium/hard), 5 short answer, 5 scenario with answer key

prompts.title: Lesson Plan Structure
prompts.task: Create detailed lesson plan for crypto training
prompts.few_shot_example: Lesson 1: Blockchain Basics, Objective: Understand distributed ledgers
prompts.report: Create 5-lesson plan with objectives, duration, materials, activities, assessment, homework

prompts.title: Structured Answer Format
prompts.role: AI assistant for clarity and structure
prompts.task: Provide answers in bullet-point structured format
prompts.few_shot_example: Q: What makes Beldex secure? A: - Encryption: AES-256 - Network: Decentralized
prompts.report: Create structured answers for 10 technical, 10 use-case, 10 safety questions

prompts.title: Process Explanation
prompts.task: Explain blockchain processes step-by-step
prompts.few_shot_example: Process: How transaction is completed, Step 1: User initiates...
prompts.report: Explain 5 processes with 6-8 steps each: transaction validation, block creation, wallet, etc.

prompts.title: Transaction Logic Explanation
prompts.task: Explain transaction logic in simple terms
prompts.few_shot_example: When you send crypto: first your wallet creates a digital signature...
prompts.report: Explain initiation, signature, broadcasting, validation, block inclusion, confirmation

prompts.title: Security Scenario Creation
prompts.task: Create security scenarios for training
prompts.few_shot_example: Scenario: You receive message claiming to be support asking for private key... What do you do?
prompts.report: Create 10 scenarios: phishing, fake app, compromise, scam, hack, social engineering, etc.

prompts.title: Text Summarization
prompts.task: Summarize complex text into bullet points
prompts.few_shot_example: Original: 'Blockchain operates on cryptography...' Summary: - Uses cryptography - Distributed nodes
prompts.report: Summarize 10 texts into 5-point bullets, emphasize key takeaways, simplify terms

prompts.title: Adaptive Learning Explanation
prompts.task: Explain concepts at different complexity levels
prompts.few_shot_example: Beginner: Blockchain = digital record book, Intermediate: distributed ledger, Advanced: Byzantine fault-tolerant
prompts.report: Create 5 concepts at 3 levels each: beginner, intermediate, advanced explanations

prompts.title: Crypto Trends Analysis
prompts.task: Explain current crypto trends (non-predictive)
prompts.few_shot_example: Trend: Increasing adoption of privacy coins by institutions
prompts.report: Analyze 10 trends: adoption, institutional interest, regulation, DeFi, environment, layer-2, etc.

prompts.title: Multi-Topic Content Research
prompts.task: Research and explain multiple related topics
prompts.few_shot_example: Topic: Privacy in Blockchain, Sub: Zero-knowledge proofs, Ring signatures, Stealth addresses
prompts.report: Research 5 topic clusters with 5-6 sub-topics each, detailed explanations

prompts.title: Job Posting Creation
prompts.task: Create job posting for crypto team role
prompts.few_shot_example: Title: Blockchain Developer, Requirements: 3+ years crypto experience
prompts.report: Create 5 job postings with responsibilities, requirements, qualifications, benefits, instructions

prompts.title: Resume Building
prompts.task: Build resume for crypto/blockchain career
prompts.few_shot_example: Professional Summary: Blockchain enthusiast with 2+ years crypto experience
prompts.report: Create 5 sample resumes with summary, skills, experience, education, certifications, projects

prompts.title: Prompt Engineering Skills
prompts.task: Improve and optimize existing prompts
prompts.few_shot_example: Before: 'Explain blockchain', After: 'As educator, explain blockchain to 12th graders with analogy'
prompts.report: Improve 10 prompts by adding role, context, tone, format, constraints, examples

prompts.title: Quality Evaluation
prompts.task: Score and evaluate prompt quality
prompts.few_shot_example: Rubric: Clarity (1-5), Specificity (1-5), Actionability (1-5), Result Quality (1-5)
prompts.report: Create rubric with criteria, scale, scoring guide, interpretation, suggestions, apply to 5 samples

prompts.title: Prompt Optimization
prompts.task: Rewrite and optimize prompts for better results
prompts.few_shot_example: Original: 'Write about crypto', Optimized: 'Write 500-word beginner guide to Bitcoin/Ethereum with analogies'
prompts.report: Optimize 10 prompts by clarifying intent, adding specificity, improving structure, enhancing examples

prompts.title: Advanced Reasoning Framework
prompts.task: Use Think-Act-Observe-Answer framework
prompts.few_shot_example: Think: What factors matter? Act: Research them. Observe: What patterns? Answer: Solution.
prompts.report: Create 5 complex problems using TAOA: privacy coin design, security fix, strategy, tech evaluation

prompts.title: Multi-Solution Evaluation
prompts.task: Generate and evaluate multiple solutions
prompts.few_shot_example: Problem: Grow community 1K to 10K. Solution 1: Social media, Pros: Low cost, Cons: Competition
prompts.report: Create 5 problems with 3 solutions each, detailed pros/cons, implementation, cost-benefit, recommendation

prompts.title: Learning Plan Creation
prompts.task: Create personalized learning plans
prompts.few_shot_example: Week 1: Blockchain Fundamentals, Monday: Video, Wednesday: Hands-on, Friday: Discussion
prompts.report: Create 5 learning plans (8-16 weeks) with weekly breakdown, daily activities, resources, milestones

prompts.title: Master Prompt Combination
prompts.task: Combine all best practices into master prompts
prompts.few_shot_example: [ROLE] [TASK] [CONTEXT] [FEW-SHOT] [OUTPUT FORMAT] [SUCCESS CRITERIA]
prompts.report: Create 5 master prompts: educator, analyst, writer, manager, consultant with all components

prompts.title: Multi-Step Research Task
prompts.task: Execute comprehensive multi-step research
prompts.few_shot_example: Step 1: Research privacy tech. Step 2: Analyze adoption. Step 3: Evaluate regulation.
prompts.report: Create 5 research projects (6-7 steps) with dependencies, metrics, outputs, resources

prompts.title: Idea to Execution Framework
prompts.task: Convert business ideas to execution plans
prompts.few_shot_example: Idea: Launch crypto platform. Planning: Market research, Platform selection, Content planning.
prompts.report: Create 5 execution plans (3-16 months) with phases, milestones, budget, team, metrics
